value_picks.name: UMB Financial Corporation
value_picks.why_undervalued: Trading at a 49% discount to estimated fair value based on cash flow models amid regional banking sector pressures.
value_picks.bull_case: Strong balance sheet and positive FCF position UMBF for recovery as interest rates stabilize and loan growth resumes.

value_picks.name: Columbia Banking System Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: Near 52-week lows with low PE multiple despite solid EPS, undervalued relative to peers in banking.
value_picks.bull_case: Improving net interest margins and regional deposit growth support re-rating higher.

value_picks.name: Mobileye Global Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: Autonomous driving leader beaten down by market concerns but trading well below historical highs.
value_picks.bull_case: Partnerships with OEMs and ADAS adoption will drive revenue acceleration.

value_picks.name: Schrödinger, Inc.
value_picks.why_undervalued: Computational platform for drug discovery undervalued after market selloff, 49% below fair value.
value_picks.bull_case: Pipeline advancements and pharma partnerships to unlock software revenue growth.

value_picks.name: Sportradar Group AG
value_picks.why_undervalued: Sports data provider near lows despite growing betting market, significant discount to intrinsic value.
value_picks.bull_case: Global sports betting expansion fuels data demand and recurring revenues.

momentum_picks.name: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd
momentum_picks.catalyst: Strong demand for high-speed connectivity solutions in AI data centers driving earnings beats.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: High growth potential in AI infra outweighs volatility.

momentum_picks.name: American Eagle Outfitters, Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Blowout Q3 earnings and raised holiday guidance amid strong comparable sales growth.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Retail momentum strong but sensitive to consumer spending shifts.

momentum_picks.name: McGraw Hill, Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Earnings estimate revisions upward by 43% due to education sector tailwinds.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Stable edtech demand supports continued outperformance.

momentum_picks.name: Micron Technology, Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Memory chip demand surge from AI applications leading to YTD +175% gains.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: AI cycle long but cyclical industry risks remain.

momentum_picks.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
momentum_picks.catalyst: Government and enterprise AI contracts accelerating revenue growth.

watchlist_updates.detail: Salesforce announced adjusted earnings of $3.25 per share for Q3 2025, beating Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.85; shares up 13% for the week heading into Dec 5.
UiPath shares increased 3.2% following robust Q3 2025 earnings report.
Five Below posted adjusted earnings of $0.68 per share for Q3 2025, exceeding Zacks Consensus Estimate.
